category_sources: Official homepage describes id3lib as a library for reading, writing, and manipulating ID3v1 and ID3v2 tags.
display_name_sources: Official homepage title is `id3lib - The ID3v1/ID3v2 Tagging Library`.
docs_sources: Official API documentation is hosted under the id3lib SourceForge site.
Official homepage lists API documentation, a web-readable ID3Lib manual, and ID3v2 programming guidelines.
repo_sources: Official id3lib homepage says development is centered on the SourceForge project and links users to browse the CVS repository.
SourceForge project page includes a Code tab for the id3lib project.
tags_sources: Official homepage states id3lib supports C and C++ interfaces for ID3v1/ID3v2 tag processing.
source_facts.executables includes id3lib tag tools, and source_facts.description says ID3 tag manipulation.
